sections.one_line: The artifacts involved in delivering a new Kernos service integration
Notion service descriptor specification for auth type, operations, and notes
Tool descriptor for a Notion read-page integration, including schema, authority, and classifications
Implementing the Notion tool function with the required context, paths, and return format
Tests for registering service tools and unit-testing pure-logic helpers
Service credential onboarding for a Kernos instance
Tool invocation and verification, including runtime checks, audit logging, and result validation
Service-specific connector substitutions for Slack, GitHub, Drive/Docs, and Gmail
Troubleshooting parse errors, tool loading failures, dispatcher rejections, and kick-back signals
